purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.
source: raw/sources/Cámara de Senadores de la Nación, 1936.pdf
no_visual_regions_reason: The page contains only minor handwritten annotations and a simple sticker, none of which qualify as substantial visuals (portraits, maps, illustrations, etc.) for standalone wiki assets. These elements are adequately captured by literal transcription and visual notes.
